pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py confirm these are the requested columns. ExampleProject/project.json and documents/SRS.json contain a traceability link named 'Verification' and an attribute named 'Priority' (as well as an attribute named 'Ver. Method').
ExampleProject/project.json and documents/SRS.json confirm the document exists. setup_task.sh opens it and verifier.py evaluates it.
verifier.py imports and calls query_vlm from gym_anything.vlm to evaluate task success via screenshots.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic 'ReqView Example Project', specifically targeting the 'SRS' document. Analysis of the project files confirms the existence of the SRS document, a 'Priority' attribute, and a 'Verification' traceability link (along with a 'Ver. Method' attribute). The objective is to make the 'Verification' and 'Priority' columns visible in the table view. Task evaluation relies heavily on a Vision-Language Model (VLM) to analyze screenshots of the final application state and trajectory.
